signals.headline: 76ers vs Celtics Game 2: Embiid Confirmed OUT, Celtics 14
signals.raw:
76ers vs Celtics Game 2: Embiid Confirmed OUT, Celtics 14.5-Point Favorites | NO series winner resolved | HIGH confidence**  
Joel Embiid is officially out for Philadelphia 76ers' Eastern Conference semifinals Game 2 vs. Boston Celtics, per the latest injury report, with 76ers lineup set as Tyrese Maxey, VJ Edgecombe, Kelly Oubre Jr., Paul George, and Adem Bona; Celtics' Ron Harper Jr. probable.[1
